homePage.welcome: Welcome to AIPA - Your AIPA Travel Companion
homePage.description: Discover personalized travel itineraries, explore top destinations, and plan your perfect trip with AIPA. Start your adventure today!
homePage.middleBannerDescription: At AIPA, we believe strong relationships enhance our ability to serve you better. We are proud members of the Sri Lanka Association of Inbound Tour Operators (SLAITO) and hold accreditations from recognized travel industry authorities, ensuring that every journey you take with us is reliable, professional, and unforgettable.
homePage.adventuresDescription: Experience the thrill of Sri Lanka's most amazing adventures, from wildlife safaris to water sports and everything in between. Let AIPA guide you to unforgettable experiences that will create lasting memories.

aboutUs.title: About AIPA
aboutUs.shortDescription:
AIPA is a premier travel agency in Sri Lanka, dedicated to providing exceptional travel experiences. Our purpose is to showcase the hidden gems of Sri Lanka, connecting travelers with the authentic beauty, culture, and unique experiences this island has to offer.

We are committed to delivering valuable services to our customers by combining our expertise, personalized guidance, and passion for travel. At AIPA, every journey is crafted to be memorable, seamless, and truly special.
aboutUs.leftService: Quote and update trips in minutes
aboutUs.rightService: Create journeys that your clients will never forget

things_to_do.title: Things to Do

itineraries.title: Itineraries
itineraries.subtitle: Handcrafted adventures that reveal the heart and soul of Sri Lanka
itineraries.animeText: Your new hangout is just around the corner!

culturalTriangleItinerary.title: Cultural Triangle Itinerary
culturalTriangleItinerary.overview: Discover the rich history and culture of Sri Lanka's Cultural Triangle with this 7-day itinerary. Explore ancient cities, majestic rock fortresses, sacred temples, and traditional village life, all while enjoying luxury accommodations and personalized guided tours.

days.day1_desc: Welcome to Sri Lanka! Transfer to your luxury hotel in the Cultural Triangle area.
days.day2_desc: Visit the Temple of the Tooth.
days.day3_desc: Private dawn climb followed by Dambulla visit.
days.day7_desc: Morning visit to Mihintale and departure.

teaHighlandItinerary.title: Tea Country & Highland Retreat
teaHighlandItinerary.overview: Immerse yourself in the misty mountains of Nuwara Eliya and experience the finest Ceylon tea plantations.

days.day1_desc: Transfer to Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka.
days.day2_desc: Scenic drive to Nuwara Eliya through tea plantations.
days.day3_desc: Visit a tea factory and explore Horton Plains.
days.day4_desc: Visit the Nine Arches Bridge and Ella rock views.
days.day5_desc: Transfer to airport or continue your journey.

wildlifeSafariItinerary.title: Wildlife Safari Adventure
wildlifeSafariItinerary.overview: Track leopards in Yala, witness elephants in Udawalawe, and experience the finest wildlife adventures.

days.day1_desc: Transfer to Yala and settle into your luxury safari lodge.
days.day2_desc: Dawn safari in Yala National Park.
days.day4_desc: Transfer to Udawalawe and afternoon elephant safari.
days.day5_desc: Visit the Elephant Orphanage and more wildlife.
days.day6_desc: Transfer to airport with memories of wildlife.

coastalParadiseItinerary.title: Coastal Paradise Journey
coastalParadiseItinerary.overview: From whale watching in Mirissa to the historic Galle Fort, experience the best of Sri Lanka's southern coast.

days.day3_desc: Relax at the beach or try water sports.
days.day4_desc: Full day exploration of Galle Fort.

grandIslandItinerary.title: The Grand Island Circuit
grandIslandItinerary.overview: The ultimate Sri Lankan adventure covering all major highlights from north to south, east to west.

days.day5_desc: Temple of the Tooth and city.

wellnessRetreatItinerary.title: Wellness & Spiritual Retreat
wellnessRetreatItinerary.overview: Rejuvenate your soul with Ayurvedic treatments, meditation sessions, and visits to sacred Buddhist temples.

days.day2_desc: Visit to sacred temples and meditation.
days.day3_desc: Full day of treatments and yoga.

destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Handpicked places showcasing the beauty and diversity of Sri Lanka
destinations.d_subtitle: Discover the unique highlights of each destination

mirissaDestination.title: Mirissa Beach Escape
mirissaDestination.overview: Relax on golden sandy beaches and enjoy unforgettable whale watching experiences in the south coast of Sri Lanka.
mirissaDestination.description: Mirissa Beach is a breathtaking tropical paradise located on the southern coast of Sri Lanka. Known for its golden sandy beaches, crystal-clear waters, and laid-back island vibes, Mirissa is the perfect escape for those seeking both relaxation and adventure. Visitors can enjoy swimming in calm lagoons, surfing the gentle waves, or embarking on an unforgettable whale-watching tour. Beyond the beach, the town offers a vibrant nightlife, cozy beach cafes, and fresh seafood restaurants. Stroll along the shore at sunset, explore hidden coves, or take a boat trip to nearby islands, making every moment at Mirissa an unforgettable experience.

whale_watching_mirissa.name: Whale Watching
whale_watching_mirissa.description: Experience watching blue whales and dolphins in the Indian Ocean.
whale_watching_mirissa.overview: Mirissa is one of the best places in the world for whale watching.

snorkeling_polhena.name: Snorkeling with Turtles
snorkeling_polhena.description: Swim with sea turtles in shallow waters.

bentotaDestination.title: Bentota Coastal Escape
bentotaDestination.overview: Experience thrilling water sports and peaceful river safaris in one of Sri Lanka’s most famous beach destinations.
bentotaDestination.description: Bentota Escape is a serene coastal retreat that captures the essence of Sri Lanka's tranquil beaches. Stretching along the turquoise waters of the Indian Ocean, Bentota offers a blend of relaxation, adventure, and cultural charm. Visitors can enjoy water sports such as jet-skiing, windsurfing, and sailing, or simply lounge on the soft sands under swaying palms. The area also offers luxury resorts, riverside dining, and guided tours to local temples and mangrove forests. Bentota is ideal for couples seeking a romantic getaway, families looking for fun by the sea, and solo travelers craving peace and rejuvenation in nature's embrace.

sigiriyaDestination.title: Sigiriya Heritage
sigiriyaDestination.overview: Discover the ancient wonders of Sri Lanka with visits to iconic UNESCO heritage sites and historic ruins.
sigiriyaDestination.description: Sigiriya Heritage is home to one of Sri Lanka’s most iconic landmarks, the Sigiriya Rock Fortress, often referred to as the 'Lion Rock.' Rising dramatically from the lush jungle, this ancient site offers a fascinating glimpse into the country’s rich history and architectural brilliance. Visitors can climb the rock to explore ancient frescoes, the famous mirror wall, and the remains of the royal palace at the summit. The surrounding gardens, water features, and moats showcase advanced engineering and aesthetic design from centuries past. Sigiriya is more than a historical monument; it is an experience that combines adventure, culture, and the natural beauty of Sri Lanka’s central plains.

kandyDestination.title: Kandy Cultural Experience
kandyDestination.overview: Immerse yourself in Sri Lanka’s rich traditions with temple visits and cultural performances.
kandyDestination.description: Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka, is a city steeped in history, tradition, and natural beauty. Nestled amidst rolling hills and surrounded by lush greenery, Kandy is famous for the Temple of the Tooth, which houses a sacred relic of the Buddha and attracts thousands of pilgrims every year. The city offers vibrant festivals such as the Esala Perahera, where traditional dancers, drummers, and decorated elephants parade through the streets in a spectacle of color and culture. Visitors can stroll around the picturesque Kandy Lake, explore the Royal Botanical Gardens, and immerse themselves in the warmth of Sri Lankan hospitality, making Kandy an essential stop for culture enthusiasts.

places.place_name: Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic

ellaDestination.title: Ella Adventure
ellaDestination.overview: Explore scenic mountain landscapes, tea plantations, and iconic landmarks in Ella.
ellaDestination.description: Kandy, the cultural capital of Sri Lanka, is a city steeped in history, tradition, and natural beauty. Nestled amidst rolling hills and surrounded by lush greenery, Kandy is famous for the Temple of the Tooth, which houses a sacred relic of the Buddha and attracts thousands of pilgrims every year. The city offers vibrant festivals such as the Esala Perahera, where traditional dancers, drummers, and decorated elephants parade through the streets in a spectacle of color and culture. Visitors can stroll around the picturesque Kandy Lake, explore the Royal Botanical Gardens, and immerse themselves in the warmth of Sri Lankan hospitality, making Kandy an essential stop for culture enthusiasts.

ella_rock_hike.name: Ella Rock Hiking
ella_rock_hike.description: Hike through tea plantations to breathtaking viewpoints.
ella_rock_hike.overview: A rewarding hike with panoramic mountain views.

ravana_zipline.name: Flying Ravana Zipline
ravana_zipline.description: High-speed zipline with stunning valley views.
ravana_zipline.overview: Sri Lanka’s first mega zipline experience.

nine_arches_photos.name: Nine Arches Bridge Photography
nine_arches_photos.description: Capture the iconic train passing through the bridge.
nine_arches_photos.overview: One of the most photographed spots in Sri Lanka.

nuwaraEliyaDestination.title: Nuwara Eliya Retreat
nuwaraEliyaDestination.overview: Enjoy cool climate, colonial charm, and breathtaking tea plantations in Sri Lanka’s hill country.
nuwaraEliyaDestination.description: Nuwara Eliya Retreat is a picturesque getaway in Sri Lanka’s highlands, known as 'Little England' for its colonial charm, cool climate, and lush tea plantations. Visitors can stroll through vibrant gardens, explore serene lakes, and tour working tea estates to learn about the process of tea cultivation. The town’s architecture, reminiscent of British colonial times, adds to the charm, while nearby Horton Plains National Park offers breathtaking hiking trails and dramatic escarpments. Nuwara Eliya is ideal for travelers seeking peace, natural beauty, and a cultural glimpse into Sri Lanka’s colonial past.

peradeniya_walk.name: Botanical Garden Walk
peradeniya_walk.description: Walk through Sri Lanka’s largest botanical garden.
peradeniya_walk.overview: Home to orchids and exotic plants.

yalaDestination.title: Yala Safari Adventure
yalaDestination.overview: Experience thrilling wildlife safaris and spot leopards in Sri Lanka’s most famous national park.
yalaDestination.description: Yala Safari is a premier wildlife destination in Sri Lanka, famous for its diverse ecosystems and abundant wildlife. The park is home to leopards, elephants, sloth bears, and hundreds of bird species, making it a thrilling experience for nature enthusiasts and photographers. Safari tours take visitors through lush forests, open grasslands, and serene lagoons, offering unforgettable encounters with the island’s native fauna. Whether observing leopards in their natural habitat or spotting elephants bathing in the rivers, Yala Safari provides a perfect blend of adventure, excitement, and connection with the wild.

yala_safari.name: Yala Safari
yala_safari.description: Explore Yala National Park in a jeep safari.

udawalaweDestination.title: Udawalawe Safari
udawalaweDestination.overview: Witness large herds of elephants and visit the famous elephant transit home.
udawalaweDestination.description: Udawalawe Safari is a spectacular wildlife destination, renowned for its large elephant herds and diverse fauna. Visitors can explore vast national parks filled with waterholes, forests, and grasslands, witnessing elephants roaming freely along with water buffaloes, deer, and exotic birds. Guided jeep safaris provide close-up encounters with nature and opportunities for stunning photography. The park is also part of important conservation efforts, making it both an educational and adventurous destination. Udawalawe Safari is perfect for families, wildlife enthusiasts, and anyone looking to experience Sri Lanka’s untamed natural beauty.

udawalawe_safari.name: Udawalawe Safari
udawalawe_safari.description: See elephants in their natural habitat.
udawalawe_safari.overview: Best place in Sri Lanka for elephant sightings.

footer.description: Providing inspiration abroad. Discover programs, travel and unforgettable experiences worldwide.

about.title: Adventure Awaits, Passion Drives Us
about.subtitle: Real experiences from happy explorers who discovered unforgettable destinations with us.

story.title: A Journey Built on Passion
story.description: A cool travel agency and tour guide service started in 2010, dedicated to making connections, sharing our travel know-how, and snagging some awards along the way.

item1.title: Tailored Adventures Just for You
item1.desc: Every journey is carefully crafted to match your interests, destinations, and travel style—ensuring a truly personalized and unforgettable experience.

item2.title: Complete Travel Support & Documentation
item2.desc: From travel insurance to visa guidance and bookings, we handle every detail so you can travel with confidence and peace of mind.

item3.title: Memories That Last a Lifetime
item3.desc: We go beyond trips—creating meaningful experiences, authentic connections, and unforgettable moments you’ll cherish forever.

item1.title: High-Quality Equipment
item1.desc: Get ready for adventure with our complete range of equipment—whether it's diving, hiking, or outdoor camping, we've got you covered!

item2.title: Personal Documentation
item2.desc: Preserve your cherished memories with our talented team of photographers capturing every special moment.

item3.title: Comprehensive Insurance
item3.desc: We've got your back with complete travel insurance so you can relax and fully enjoy your journey.
